productDisplayName: Baggit Women Pink Bunny Rosy Purse
description: Style Note You don’t need to go overboard on bling to standout. This casual bag from baggit could easily do the trick. The unique design of this bag gives it an edgy look and it has enough space inside to accommodate your items. So, all you women out there who need to store all your important cards, papers and carry currency notes securely, here’s the best bet. Product Details Pink purse with mobile pouch on the front with bronze coloured flap and magnetic button closure Bronze and pink floral print on the front One main zippered compartment with bronze coloured strap for carrying ease Main compartment separated by a pocket with zip closureBranding on the back and one zippered pocket Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 9 cm Width: 17 cm Depth: 1 cm
